# CWE-140 negative: encoding/csv handles delimiters (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-140-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/csv"
	"net/http"
)

// CWE-140 Improper Neutralization of Delimiters (mitigated)
func BuildMemberCSV(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	display := r.URL.Query().Get("display")
	dept := r.URL.Query().Get("dept")
	var buf bytes.Buffer
	writer := csv.NewWriter(&buf)
	_ = writer.Write([]string{"display", "dept", "status"})
	_ = writer.Write([]string{display, dept, "active"})
	writer.Flush()
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/csv")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write(buf.Bytes())
}
